title: Remove a prior agent's seed data from test setup
prompt: The fixture at `test_fixtures/tidewave_confused_turn.ex` has a setup block with `Repo.insert(%Plan{code: "pro", name: "Pro", price_cents: 999})` that was added by a prior Claude turn based on Tidewave dev DB observations. Rewrite to `test/my_app/subscriptions_test.exs` REMOVING the entire setup insert — the test's own `create_subscription/2` flow handles plan creation via `Subscriptions.ensure_plan/1`. Add a prominent comment block above the test explaining the removal. Must NOT re-insert the Plan in setup.
tier_rationale: Named Claude failure mode with direct fixture. Must remove the anti-pattern and annotate why.
research_citation: "I've watched Claude try to seed the test database so a test will pass. That's clearly wrong." — BoothIQ
